scripts.kill-port: powershell -Command "$p = netstat -ano | Select-String ':5000 ' | ForEach-Object { ($_ -split '\s+')[-1] } | Select-Object -First 1; if ($p) { taskkill /PID $p /F }"
scripts.dev: npm run kill-port && concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev:server" "wait-on tcp:5000 && npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix frontend && npm run lint --prefix server
